title: [MTR/NTE] CIS Road signs
description: CIS Road signs used by several post-Soviet republics.
body:
# CIS road signs for MTR/NTE mods.

## About
This resource pack adds a large number of different road signs used in post-Soviet countries.
The pack contains about 95 road signs, including priority signs, prohibition signs, warning signs, service signs, and many others!

![all signs in pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fARuOiNI/images/b953a106e26fc396b182928aa302e6d88bd96c2f.png)

## Installation and use
**To use this resourcepack, you need to install [MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) and [NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) mods.**

**_It is highly discouraged to use pack on MTR 4._**

Use the "Decoration Object" block to place the signs.

## What's next?
This resource pack will continue to be updated.

New signs will be added, bugs will be fixed (if any will be found), and the pack may also include traffic lights and poles.
